features: NATURAL RELIEF: Masterplast wristbands use acupressure to provide a nautral alternative to ease nausea, morning sickness and motion sickness without causing drowsiness or other side effects
ACUPRESSURE: Natural relief, ideal for morning sickness, nausea and motion sickness associated in cars, boats and air travel.
WASHABLE: The comfortable soft fabric bands are washable, dry flat and store for future use
ONE SIZE: The soft fabric is elasticated, stretching to allow the bands to fit most wrist sizes, suitable for children and adults
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Pair of Wristbands
description: Masterplast wristbands use acupressure to provide a nautral alternative to ease nausea, morning sickness and motion sickness without causing drowsiness or other side effects. The soft fabric is elasticated, stretching to allow the bands to fit most wrist sizes, suitable for children and adults. The comfortable soft fabric bands are washable, dry flat and store for future use. Pack contains one pair of wristbnds
